mapper.insert: INSERT INTO major ( name, active, college, room, tel, chair_professor, capacity, start_date, info ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{active}, #{college}, #{room}, #{tel}, #{chairProfessorId}, #{capacity}, #{startDate}, #{info} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.major_id, m.name, m.capacity, m.room, m.tel, m.college, m.active, m.chair_professor AS chairProfessorId, mem.name AS chairProfessorName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professor p WHERE p.major_id = m.major_id) AS professorCount FROM major m LEFT JOIN member mem ON m.chair_professor = mem.member_id ORDER BY m.name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE major SET name = #{name}, active = #{active}, college = #{college}, room = #{room}, tel = #{tel}, chair_professor = #{chairProfessorId}, capacity = #{capacity}, start_date = #{startDate}, info = #{info} WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.name, m.active, m.college, m.room, m.tel, m.chair_professor AS chairProfessorId, mem.name AS chairProfessorName, m.capacity, m.start_date, m.info FROM major m LEFT JOIN member mem ON m.chair_professor = mem.member_id WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
SELECT p.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS name FROM professor p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.status = '재직' ORDER BY m.name
